title: Fix queue slice LHS assignment being silently discarded

features.name: queue slice assignment on LHS
features.description: Code should include a queue slice assignment on the LHS where dynamic indices are used to select a range of queue elements for assignment

features.name: queue slice assignment with middle range
features.description: Code should include a queue slice assignment that replaces elements in the middle of a queue, where the slice indices are non-constant expressions

features.name: queue slice assignment at boundaries
features.description: Code should include queue slice assignments at front and back boundaries where the slice spans from or to queue endpoints

features.name: single element queue slice assignment
features.description: Code should include a queue slice assignment where the slice range selects only a single element (a:a notation)
